items.title: Canada Financials Stocks Close In on Top Spot as Energy Momentum Fades
items.description: Canada’s financial stocks are on the verge of overtaking energy as the best performing sector in the equity market this year.

items.title: Goldman Says Hedge Funds Sell US Tech Stocks at Record Pace
items.description: Hedge funds pulled back from US tech stocks at a record pace over the past two months, according to Goldman Sachs Group Inc.’s Prime Services desk.

items.title: Gold Miner Cadillac, Backers Seek $258 Million in Canada IPO
items.description: Cadillac Mines Corp. and some of its backers are seeking to raise as much as C$363 million ($258 million) in an initial public offering, adding to the mining-driven rebound of public listing activity

items.title: Goldman Offers Preferred Stock Days After Post-Crisis Spread Low
items.description: Goldman Sachs Group Inc. is looking to sell new preferred shares just days after a metric determining risk and value in these securities hit its lowest level since the global financial crisis.

items.title: Shapoorji Closes One of India’s Biggest Private Credit Deals
items.description: India’s Shapoorji Pallonji Group on Monday completed one of the country’s largest private credit transactions, raising around 151 billion rupees ($1.6 billion), according to people familiar with the m

items.title: Short Bets Against US Equities Hit Record as AI Risks Mount
items.description: Bearish bets across US stocks are surging to a record in the face of market gains, reflecting anxiety about the staying power of a rally that has seen the S&P 500 jump 18% from late March.

items.title: Hormuz Crisis Flares Just as Fuel Markets Tighten
items.description: With the US summer driving season well underway, gasoline pump prices have again surged past $4 a gallon.

items.title: Reformation, Backers Seek $239 Million in US IPO
items.description: Reformation Inc., a sustainable womenswear brand, and shareholders including its private equity backer Permira are seeking to raise as much as $239 million in its US initial public offering.

items.title: South Korea Stock Boom: Why Kospi Is World’s Most Volatile Benchmark Stock Index
items.description: Investing in South Korea’s stock market has yielded huge returns this year, but it’s been a wild ride. Volatility on the benchmark Kospi Index has topped 60%, almost double that of Japan’s Nikkei 225.

items.title: Jersey Mike’s, Backers Seek Up to $1.09 Billion in US IPO
items.description: Sandwich chain Jersey Mike’s Subs Inc. and its shareholders are looking to raise as much as $1.09 billion in an initial public offering, as consumer-oriented companies join the US listing rebound.

items.title: KKR-Backed Serentica Eyes $450 Million Loan in Renewables Push
items.description: Serentica Renewables India Pvt Ltd., backed by private equity firm KKR & Co., is raising about $450 million through an offshore loan, underscoring growing global appetite to fund India’s clean energy

items.title: Alkegen Plans Prepackaged Bankruptcy in Deal for Fresh Cash
items.description: Alkegen has signed a restructuring deal with lenders that will inject the specialty materials maker with new money and slash its debt load by about $3.1 billion, according to a person familiar with th

items.title: Singapore Mulls Lower Taxes, Easier Talent Entry for Hedge Funds
items.description: Singapore is considering cutting taxes for hedge funds and other asset managers and making it easier for them to hire more foreign talent, as rival Hong Kong nears finalization of widespread tax exemp

items.title: Philippine Senate Seeks VP Duterte’s Bank, Tax Records in Trial
items.description: The Philippine Senate impeachment court will subpoena the bank and tax records of Vice President Sara Duterte as her opponents seek to oust the nation’s second-highest official on allegations that inc

items.title: US Gasoline Tops $4 a Gallon Again as Iran War Escalates
items.description: US gasoline prices at the pump climbed back above the $4-a-gallon mark as the Middle East conflict intensified, threatening to exacerbate a global crunch for transportation fuels and stoke inflation.

items.title: Emerging Stocks Extend Drop on Energy, Semiconductor Jitters
items.description: Emerging equities extended losses as renewed US bombing of Iran lifted oil prices above $90 a barrel and chip stocks remained under pressure.

items.title: Key China Copper Gauge Rallies to $100 After Tax Crackdown
items.description: A closely-watched gauge of China’s copper market has risen to the highest in more than a year, as a tax shake-up in the metal’s biggest market spurs a shortage of scrap and boosts demand for imports.

items.title: Paris Corn Hits Seven-Week High After Ukraine Cargo Attack
items.description: Corn prices reached the highest level in seven weeks in Paris as renewed tensions in the Black Sea stoked supply concerns.

items.title: Stocks Get Lift From Chipmakers as Oil Rally Wanes: Markets Wrap
items.description: A rebound in chipmakers powered Wall Street gains, with stocks also rising as oil fell on hopes for a revival of a peace deal between the US and Iran that has all-but collapsed amid an escalation of h

items.title: Latest Oil Market News and Analysis for July 20
items.description: Oil swung sharply between gains and losses in a fraught session as traders grappled with a barrage of headlines that suggest a worsening of the Middle East conflict, as well as attempts to bring about
